{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Crystal Fields
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The merciful die on the [[Crystal Fields]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Zakareth]] stepped into the [[Crystal Fields]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
